final:
module RefModule(
   input clk,
   input reset,
   input [3:0] i_value,
   output reg [3:0] value
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge reset or posedge dbg_halt) begin
      if (reset) begin
         value <= i_value;
      end else if (value == 4'hF) begin
         value <= 4'h0;
      end else begin
         value <= value + 4'h1;
      end
   end

endmodule
